description: Cross-language conformance for the M3U/M3U8 IPTV playlist parser (LT1). Each case pins a playlist text to the parsed Playlist wire form. The parser is tolerant (bare URLs, unknown directives, malformed EXTINF), captures #EXTVLCOPT as HTTP headers (http-user-agent -> User-Agent, http-referrer -> Referer) and #KODIPROP as raw props, splits the display name at the first UNQUOTED comma, and truncates a fractional duration to an integer (-1 for live).

cases.name: full_channel_with_attrs_headers_props_and_epg_url
cases.text:
#EXTM3U url-tvg="http://epg.xml"
#EXTINF:-1 tvg-id="cnn.us" tvg-name="CNN" tvg-logo="http://l/cnn.png" group-title="News" tvg-chno="5",CNN HD
#EXTVLCOPT:http-user-agent=Mozilla/5.0
#EXTVLCOPT:http-referrer=http://ref
#KODIPROP:inputstream.adaptive.license_type=clearkey
http://stream/cnn.m3u8
